expectations.text: Chooses Pydantic BaseModel because this is external input crossing a trust boundary
expectations.evidence: Uses Pydantic BaseModel for Customer and StripeWebhookPayload

expectations.text: Uses ConfigDict with strict=True, frozen=True, and extra='forbid'
expectations.evidence: Lines 13, 21: ConfigDict(strict=True, frozen=True, extra='forbid') on both models

expectations.text: Uses Annotated type aliases for reusable constraints
expectations.evidence: Lines 8-9: NonEmptyStr and PositiveInt defined as module-level Annotated aliases
